results.justification: RLM recursively sub-calls LLMs on chunked input for long-context management — same artefact (long-context compression for LLM ingestion) + recursive structure; different mechanism (REPL vs pairwise anchor fusion).
SAC selects anchor tokens + aggregates context K-V — the anchor primitive of KENNING-CASCADE applied at SINGLE stage; recursion is the only differentiator.

results.matched_effect_cluster: LCM hierarchical summary DAG lossless pointers
results.justification: LCM uses recursive context compression via hierarchical summary DAG with LOSSLESS POINTERS to originals — DIRECT FUNCTIONAL TWIN of KENNING-CASCADE's referent-preservation via cross-attention to originals.
Tree-structured hierarchical accumulation up parse tree from leaves to nonterminals — matches pairwise fusion hierarchy with log-depth; recursion structure equivalent.
AdmTree builds hierarchical gist-token summarization tree with attention scope restricted to associated sub-segments — same artefact and tree compression structure.
EDU-level structured compression enforcing referential integrity (lossless pointer into input) — same lossless pointer mechanic as KENNING-CASCADE referent preservation.
Wavelet-inspired hierarchical resolution transformer is LITERALLY log-depth multi-scale pairwise aggregation — the kernel of KENNING-CASCADE.
CCF segment-wise semantic aggregation with KV memory — single-pass version of KENNING-CASCADE.
